title: Walkablerails
description: Allows mobs to pathfind over rails, including modded ones like create's
body:
# Walkable Rails

Allows mobs to pathfind over rails, including modded ones like create's. 

This reverses Mojang's decision to mark [MC-33350](https://mojira.dev/MC-33359) as WAI.

Originally created for DeceasedCraft but I decided to port to modern versions because why not, its a 1-mixin mod so multiplat/version wasn't hard.
